CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Continued To Jul-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendants Rocking P., Inc., Dba Rivers Edge Products, Inc.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEVEN L. IRIKI of Moscone Emblidge Sater & Otis, Tel No. (415) 362-3599 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. KIARA W. GEBHART of Shulman Hodges & Bastian, LLP, Tel No. (949) 340-3400 appearing telephonically for Defendant Big 5 Sporting Goods Corporation.

The Court required parties to appear at hearing. Argument presented by counsel. Matter submitted. The Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF MARK MOORBERG Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Proposed Consent Judgment As To Defendants Rocking P., Inc., Dba Rivers Edge Products, Inc. is GRANTED. ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
